test_cases.description: Urban journalism podcast launch — Frequency — 7 images, Instagram, 2-week campaign, documentary style
test_cases.input_summary: Clear campaign goal (show launch), existing visual identity referenced, 7 images, thematic collection structure, specific platform (Instagram), Flux
test_cases.output_summary: Visual anchor string extracted and labeled; batch overview describes macro-to-micro narrative arc across 7 images; no two images share composition type (verified: wide/close/medium/medium/wide/close/wide); content notes give specific calendar placement and caption direction; generation notes advise starting with most compositionally specific image

test_cases.description: True crime podcast episode promotion — 5 images, Twitter/X and Instagram cross-post, dark aesthetic
test_cases.input_summary: Episode-specific campaign (not show launch), dark aesthetic, cross-platform (Twitter/X landscape + Instagram), 5 images, sequential narrative structure
test_cases.output_summary: Batch structured as a sequential tease — each image reveals slightly more about the episode's subject; format adapts for Twitter/X (16:9 dominates); content notes suggest posting timing relative to episode drop day; visual variety achieved through light-dark-light-dark-light rhythm within dark aesthetic

test_cases.description: Science magazine recurring content series — 10 images, mixed platforms, monthly calendar fill
test_cases.input_summary: Recurring series (not launch), 10 images, editorial science photography register, bright and curious aesthetic, multi-platform
test_cases.output_summary: Batch organized into 3 thematic clusters within the 10 (discovery/research/application) for posting calendar logic; consistent visual anchor across all 10; platform format varies between images based on content type; content notes specify which cluster each image belongs to for calendar planning

notes: The compositional variety planning is the most important quality signal — a batch where all images have the same composition type is not useful as a social media series. The content notes (calendar placement + caption direction) elevate the skill from a pure image-prompting tool to a content planning tool. Consistency dimension is strong because the visual anchor string approach reliably constrains all prompts in the batch.
